summary: Comprehensive testing completed for C.R.A.S.H. motorcycle impact detector web application. All core functionality working correctly including theme/language switching, impact simulation, AI analysis integration, and mobile responsiveness.

design_issues.issue:
React hydration warning:
cannot be descendant of

in AISection component

passed_tests: Backend crash analysis with Spanish language
Backend crash analysis with English language
Frontend homepage loads with C.R.A.S.H. title
Impact simulation triggers alert state with emergency overlay
G-Force display updates correctly during alert (1.05G to 11.96G)
AI analysis button appears during alert and calls backend API successfully
AI analysis results displayed with proper severity and recommendations
Mobile mockup shows alert state with cancel functionality
Navigation links work correctly (Problema, Arquitectura, Hardware)
Mobile responsiveness - all controls work on mobile viewport
Cancel alert functionality works - overlay removed, G-Force returns to normal
